ctaText: Ready to plan a shoot? Tell us about your project and we will follow up with next steps.

seoDescription: MoranSha Photography services for food, real estate, and brand visual storytelling.
foodTitle: Professional photography for dishes, menus, and brands.
realEstateTitle: Professional photography for homes, condos, and commercial properties.
storyTitle: Images with atmosphere, intention, and commercial clarity.
storyText: From restaurant campaigns to property listings, each session is shaped around the visual story your audience needs to feel first.

approachItems.title: Curated direction
approachItems.text: Each shoot begins with a practical visual brief, styling notes, and a clear shot list.

approachItems.title: Fast delivery
approachItems.text: Edited galleries are prepared for web, social, listings, menus, and campaign launches.

approachItems.title: Flexible sessions
approachItems.text: Choose food, real estate, or brand direction with a scope that matches your project.

seoDescription: Learn about MoranSha Photography's visual approach for food, real estate, and brand imagery.
heroTitle: Photography built around atmosphere and useful visual clarity.
heroIntro: MoranSha Photography creates refined image libraries for hospitality brands, property teams, makers, and businesses that need stronger visual storytelling.
approachTitle: Visuals should feel cinematic, but still work hard for the business.
approachParagraphs: The goal is to make images that hold attention and also serve a practical purpose: selling a dish, explaining a property, launching a campaign, or making a brand feel more complete.
Every session is planned around lighting, composition, usage needs, and a clear delivery path.

values.title: Intentional planning
values.text: Every shoot starts with the audience, platform, timeline, and visual goal in mind.

values.title: Editorial restraint
values.text: The images feel polished without becoming overworked, artificial, or hard to use.

values.title: Practical delivery
values.text: Final galleries are shaped for websites, listings, menus, campaigns, social feeds, and press needs.

seoDescription: Food photography services for restaurants, menus, chefs, and hospitality brands.
heroTitle: Menu imagery with appetite, mood, and polish.
heroIntro: Create a refined visual library for restaurants, hospitality teams, chefs, launch menus, and brand campaigns.
featureTitle: Designed for menus, campaigns, delivery apps, and social launches.
featureText: Each session starts with a practical shot list and styling direction so the final images feel intentional across your website, menu, listings, and promotional channels.
coverageTitle: Flexible food imagery for the way your brand sells.

coverageItems.title: Signature dishes
coverageItems.text: Hero images for menu favorites, seasonal dishes, chef specials, and launch items.

coverageItems.title: Hospitality details
coverageItems.text: Atmosphere, service, ingredients, table scenes, and environmental images for richer storytelling.

coverageItems.title: Brand campaigns
coverageItems.text: Visual direction for ads, websites, delivery platforms, and social media rollouts.

seoDescription: Real estate photography services for homes, condos, and commercial properties.
heroTitle: Property imagery that feels spacious, honest, and elevated.
heroIntro: Present homes, condos, commercial spaces, and architectural details with a calm, polished visual language.
featureTitle: Clean, composed images for listings, rentals, portfolios, and commercial spaces.
featureText: The focus is on strong framing, natural flow, and visual clarity so buyers, renters, and clients understand the space quickly.
coverageTitle: Everything needed to make a space easy to read.

coverageItems.title: Interior flow
coverageItems.text: Rooms, sightlines, natural light, finishes, and detail shots that help viewers understand the layout.

coverageItems.title: Exterior presence
coverageItems.text: Front elevation, outdoor areas, views, amenities, entrances, and environmental context.

coverageItems.title: Commercial use
coverageItems.text: Imagery for offices, hospitality spaces, rental properties, design portfolios, and marketing materials.

seoDescription: Contact MoranSha Photography to plan a food, real estate, or brand photography project.
heroTitle: Book a shoot with a clear creative direction.
heroIntro: Tell us what you are creating, when you need it, and the kind of imagery that will move the project forward.
formIntro: Use this form as a project brief. The next step is a direct follow-up to confirm timing, scope, and creative needs.
detailsText: Reach out through email, social, or WhatsApp with a short description of your project.

bookingSteps.title: 1. Send the brief
bookingSteps.text: Share the project type, location, timeline, and the images you need.

bookingSteps.title: 2. Confirm the direction
bookingSteps.text: We align on style, shot priorities, schedule, and delivery needs.

bookingSteps.title: 3. Create the gallery
bookingSteps.text: The final image set is prepared for web, social, listing, menu, or campaign use.

seoDescription: Frequently asked questions about booking MoranSha Photography services.
heroIntro: A quick guide to timelines, planning, image delivery, locations, and what to prepare before your session.

questions.title: How do I start a booking?
questions.text: Send a project inquiry through the contact page with the service type, location, timing, and what the images will be used for.

questions.title: What should I prepare before a food shoot?
questions.text: Prepare a shot list, menu priorities, available surfaces, plating needs, props, and any visual references that match your brand direction.

questions.title: What should be ready for real estate photography?
questions.text: Spaces should be clean, decluttered, and shoot-ready before arrival. Open blinds, hide personal items, and make sure key rooms are accessible.

questions.title: How are final images delivered?
questions.text: Edited images are delivered digitally in a format suited to your intended use, such as web, social, listings, menus, or campaign materials.

questions.title: Can you help with creative direction?
questions.text: Yes. The booking process includes alignment on mood, usage, priorities, and practical styling notes before the session.

questions.title: Do you travel for shoots?
questions.text: Location needs are discussed during booking. Share the address or city in the inquiry so timing and logistics can be confirmed.

ctaTitle: Send the project details and start the conversation.
ctaText: Use the booking form to share your timing, location, and visual goals.

seoDescription: Privacy policy for the MoranSha Photography website.
heroIntro: How information submitted through this website is handled in a simple service inquiry context.

sections.title: Information collected
sections.text: This site may collect details you choose to submit, such as your name, email address, phone number, service interest, location, timeline, and project notes.

sections.title: How information is used
sections.text: Inquiry details are used to respond to your message, discuss project scope, coordinate booking logistics, and provide relevant studio updates when you opt in.

sections.title: Newsletter
sections.text: If you join the mailing list, your email is used for studio updates, booking windows, portfolio news, and related announcements. You can request removal at any time.

sections.title: Sharing information
sections.text: Personal inquiry details are not sold. Information may be shared only when needed to operate the website, communicate with you, or comply with lawful requirements.

sections.title: Contact
sections.text: For privacy questions or update requests, contact the studio through the contact page.

seoDescription: Terms of service for MoranSha Photography website use and service inquiries.
heroIntro: General website and inquiry terms for MoranSha Photography service pages.

sections.title: Website use
sections.text: This website is provided for general information, portfolio review, and service inquiries. Content may change as services, availability, and studio details evolve.

sections.title: Inquiries
sections.text: Submitting a form does not confirm a booking. A session is confirmed only after scope, timing, deliverables, and any required agreement details are accepted by both parties.

sections.title: Creative work
sections.text: Final usage terms, licensing, delivery timeline, and project details should be confirmed directly for each session before work begins.

sections.title: Website content
sections.text: Text, layouts, visuals, and original project materials on this site may not be reused without permission, except where placeholder assets are clearly sourced from third-party providers.

sections.title: Limitations
sections.text: This website is provided as-is. The studio aims to keep information accurate, but does not guarantee uninterrupted access or error-free content.

seoDescription: Cancellation and rescheduling policy for MoranSha Photography service bookings.
heroIntro: A plain-language policy page for timing changes, weather, access issues, and session coordination.

sections.title: Rescheduling
sections.text: If timing needs to change, contact the studio as early as possible. New dates depend on availability, location, and project requirements.

sections.title: Weather or access issues
sections.text: Outdoor property images, exterior details, and location-based shoots may need adjustment for weather, site access, safety, or unexpected conditions.

sections.title: Client readiness
sections.text: Locations, dishes, spaces, or products should be ready at the confirmed session time. Delays may affect the final shot list or require a new session window.

sections.title: Confirmed agreements
sections.text: Any project-specific cancellation, rescheduling, deposit, or licensing terms should be confirmed directly as part of the booking agreement.

sections.title: Questions
sections.text: For questions about a scheduled project, use the contact page and include the project name, location, and target date.

seoDescription: Terms and conditions for MoranSha Photography inquiries, bookings, privacy, cancellations, and website use.
heroTitle: A clear guide to inquiries, bookings, privacy, and cancellations.
heroIntro: These terms explain how MoranSha Photography handles website inquiries, project planning, client information, scheduling changes, and creative work.

sections.title: Before a project is booked
sections.text: Submitting an inquiry form starts a conversation, but it does not automatically confirm a shoot. A booking is confirmed only after the project scope, date, location, deliverables, timeline, and any required agreement details are reviewed and accepted by both sides.

sections.title: Project details and creative work
sections.text: Each project is planned around the intended use of the images, the shoot location, the subject matter, and the final delivery needs. Usage rights, licensing, editing expectations, delivery timing, and any special requirements should be confirmed before work begins.

sections.title: Client readiness
sections.text: Locations, dishes, properties, products, people, access instructions, and creative references should be ready at the confirmed session time. If something important is delayed or unavailable, the final shot list, session length, or delivery timeline may need to change.

sections.title: Rescheduling and cancellations
sections.text: If a session needs to move, please contact the studio as early as possible. New dates depend on availability, project needs, location access, and weather. Any project-specific deposit, cancellation, or rescheduling terms should be confirmed as part of the booking agreement.

sections.title: Weather, access, and safety
sections.text: Outdoor shoots, real estate exteriors, drone-style visuals, and location-based projects may need adjustment because of weather, site access, safety, building rules, or unexpected conditions. The goal is always to protect the quality of the work and keep the shoot practical.

sections.title: How your information is used
sections.text: Information you submit through the website, such as your name, email address, phone number, service interest, location, timeline, and project notes, is used to respond to your inquiry, discuss project scope, coordinate booking logistics, and communicate with you about your request.

sections.title: Privacy
sections.text: Your personal inquiry details are not sold. Information may be shared only when needed to operate the website, communicate with you, support the project, or comply with lawful requirements. If you join any mailing list or update list, you can request removal at any time.

sections.title: Website content
sections.text: The text, layout, visuals, and original project materials on this website may not be reused without permission. Website content is provided for general information and may change as services, availability, and studio details evolve.

sections.title: Questions
sections.text: If you have questions about a project, a scheduled session, privacy, or these terms, please use the contact page and include the project name, location, target date, and any details that would help the studio respond clearly.
